languages.text: "Вот как? У моей дочери множество слуг, и впервые од{mf|ин|на} из них дерзнул заговорить со мной лично. В награду за верность сегодня я не выдам вам плетей. Но мне интересно, что вам есть сказать в свое оправдание".

"Is that so? My daughter has a great many servants, but you are the first to dare speak to me directly. As a reward for your loyalty, I will not give you any lashes today. But I am curious what you have to say in your defence."
languages.original_text: "Вот как? У моей дочери множество слуг, и впервые од{mf|ин|на} из них дерзнул заговорить со мной лично. В награду за верность сегодня я не выдам вам плетей. Но мне интересно, что вам есть сказать в свое оправдание".

traits.locale_text: "Is that so? My daughter has a great many servants, but you are the first to dare speak to me directly. As a reward for your loyalty, I will not give you any lashes today. But I am curious what you have to say in your defence."

"Is that so? My daughter has a great many servants, but you are the first to dare speak to me directly. As a reward for your loyalty, I will not give you any lashes today. But I am curious what you have to say in your defence."

"Is that so? My daughter has a great many servants, but you are the first to dare speak to me directly. As a reward for your loyalty, I will not give you any lashes today. But I am curious what you have to say in your defence."

languages.text: “是吗？我女儿手下有不少仆从，但敢直接跟我对话的，你还是头一个。看在你忠心可嘉的份上，今天我就不赏你鞭子了。不过我倒挺好奇，你打算怎么为自己辩白。”
languages.original_text: "Is that so? My daughter has a great many servants, but you are the first to dare speak to me directly. As a reward for your loyalty, I will not give you any lashes today. But I am curious what you have to say in your defence."

traits.locale_text: “是吗？我女儿手下有不少仆从，但敢直接跟我对话的，你还是头一个。看在你忠心可嘉的份上，今天我就不赏你鞭子了。不过我倒挺好奇，你打算怎么为自己辩白。”

languages.text: « Vraiment ? Ma fille a de nombreux serviteurs, mais vous êtes {mf|le premier|la première} à oser vous adresser directement à moi. En guise de récompense pour votre loyauté, je vous épargne le fouet pour cette fois. En revanche, je suis curieux d'entendre ce que vous avez à dire pour votre défense. »
languages.original_text: "Is that so? My daughter has a great many servants, but you are the first to dare speak to me directly. As a reward for your loyalty, I will not give you any lashes today. But I am curious what you have to say in your defence."

traits.locale_text: « Vraiment ? Ma fille a de nombreux serviteurs, mais vous êtes {mf|le premier|la première} à oser vous adresser directement à moi. En guise de récompense pour votre loyauté, je vous épargne le fouet pour cette fois. En revanche, je suis curieux d'entendre ce que vous avez à dire pour votre défense. »

languages.text: "Öyle mi? Kızımın pek çok hizmetkârı vardır fakat doğrudan benimle konuşmaya cüret eden ilk sensin. Sadakatinin ödülü olarak bugün sana kırbaç cezası vermeyeceğim. Fakat kendini savunmak için neler diyeceğini ziyadesiyle merak ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "Is that so? My daughter has a great many servants, but you are the first to dare speak to me directly. As a reward for your loyalty, I will not give you any lashes today. But I am curious what you have to say in your defence."

traits.locale_text: "Öyle mi? Kızımın pek çok hizmetkârı vardır fakat doğrudan benimle konuşmaya cüret eden ilk sensin. Sadakatinin ödülü olarak bugün sana kırbaç cezası vermeyeceğim. Fakat kendini savunmak için neler diyeceğini ziyadesiyle merak ediyorum."

languages.text: «¿De verdad? Mi hija tiene muchos sirvientes, pero es {mf|el|la} primer{mf|o|a} que se atreve a hablarme directamente. Como recompensa por su lealtad, no le haré flagelar. Siento curiosidad por saber qué tiene que alegar en su defensa».
languages.original_text: "Is that so? My daughter has a great many servants, but you are the first to dare speak to me directly. As a reward for your loyalty, I will not give you any lashes today. But I am curious what you have to say in your defence."

traits.locale_text: «¿De verdad? Mi hija tiene muchos sirvientes, pero es {mf|el|la} primer{mf|o|a} que se atreve a hablarme directamente. Como recompensa por su lealtad, no le haré flagelar. Siento curiosidad por saber qué tiene que alegar en su defensa».

languages.text: "Tatsächlich? Meine Tochter hat viele Bedienstete, aber Ihr seid {mf|der Erste, der|die Erste, die} es wagt, so direkt mit mir zu reden. Als Lohn für Eure Loyalität, werde ich Euch heute nicht auspeitschen lassen. Allerdings wüsste ich gerne, was Ihr zu Eurer Verteidigung zu sagen habt."
languages.original_text: "Is that so? My daughter has a great many servants, but you are the first to dare speak to me directly. As a reward for your loyalty, I will not give you any lashes today. But I am curious what you have to say in your defence."

traits.locale_text: "Tatsächlich? Meine Tochter hat viele Bedienstete, aber Ihr seid {mf|der Erste, der|die Erste, die} es wagt, so direkt mit mir zu reden. Als Lohn für Eure Loyalität, werde ich Euch heute nicht auspeitschen lassen. Allerdings wüsste ich gerne, was Ihr zu Eurer Verteidigung zu sagen habt."

languages.text: 「そうなの？娘にはたくさんの召使いがいるが、君だけは直接話しかけてきた。君のような忠実な者には、今日は鞭も打たない。だが、君が言い訳をする内容が気になる。」
languages.original_text: "Is that so? My daughter has a great many servants, but you are the first to dare speak to me directly. As a reward for your loyalty, I will not give you any lashes today. But I am curious what you have to say in your defence."

traits.locale_text: 「そうなの？娘にはたくさんの召使いがいるが、君だけは直接話しかけてきた。君のような忠実な者には、今日は鞭も打たない。だが、君が言い訳をする内容が気になる。」
